title: Rotation warm-up
detail: 3-position turn drill to groove the swing motion before you start hitting.

steps.heading: Body motion (same for all three positions)
cues: Stand shoulder-width apart; left foot turned out slightly toward the target.
Head and eyes stay forward — no turning.
Turn your shoulders back to the right; lower slightly through the knees.
Turn through the hips forward and rotate to the front.
Right foot turns and finishes up on the toes.
Weight starts on the back foot and ends on the front foot.
Go slowly — a few reps at each position.

steps.heading: Position 1 — club behind the shoulders
cues: Hold the club behind your shoulders, one hand beside each shoulder, thumbs toward your body.
Run through the body motion above.

steps.heading: Position 2 — club in front, above the belt line
cues: Move the club to the front, just above the belt line.
Keep it level — it should only turn around your body, not move up and down.

steps.heading: Position 3 — club behind the body, above the belt line
cues: Move the club behind your body, above the belt line.

title: Grip check
detail: Left hand like a handshake, club to the base of the small finger, hands interlocked. Looking down: two knuckles of the left hand, and the right-hand V pointing toward your right arm.

title: Half → full swings
detail: Start with half swings, then build to full. Left arm straight, right arm folds; turn through the shoulders. Watch that the club doesn't go too far behind your back.
